title: Dappled Forest
description: 26.3; adds the upcoming Dappled Forest biome, alongside Abandoned Camps, Wool Stairs and more
body:
### The Dappled Forest

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/yhxPgezglg8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This mod re adds everything currently announced to come in 26.3, including the beautiful **Dappled Forest** biome, **Poplar Trees**, coming in yellow, red and orange varients, planks, stairs, slabs, signs, boats, **shelf mushrooms** and much more!
![dappled forest aerial view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6fe5ec92425b1ce0d9d89791a310ad2d051479b.png)

Alongside those, this mods adds the **Abandoned Camps**, which are found in various biomes and can give you some nice starter loot. ![abandond camp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef4e237b43590939d097c82b967babfb690813ec.png)Abandoned Camps spawn with **Wooly Stairs**, which is also added in this mod alongside **Wooly Slabs** (coming in all 16 colours)

I also took some creative liberties and added some of my own ideas, such as **Fox Dens** you can find burrowed underground in the dappled forest biome, and **Steppe Dirt**!

_**(full credit to TheChampi08n on Reddit for helping me with the textures! =D)**_
